title: crotalaria vitellina
intro: Crotalaria vitellina, a plant species belonging to the legume family, is commonly known as the golden bush or yellow rattle. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Crotalaria vitellina can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine practices.
